notes: RE_LVL_DMOD(val): if BaseLv > 99, skillratio = skillratio * BaseLv / val
Negative HitCount means client displays N hits but server calculates as 1 damage packet

SM_BASH.name: Bash
SM_BASH.special: Hit rate bonus: +5% per level applied on final hitrate. Lv6+ with Fatal Blow: stun chance = (skill_lv - 5) * BaseLv * 10 / 5000

SM_MAGNUM.name: Magnum Break
SM_MAGNUM.formula: Inner 3x3: skillratio = 100 + 20 * skill_lv; Outer 5x5: skillratio = 100 + 10 * skill_lv
SM_MAGNUM.special: AoE splash (inner 3x3, outer 5x5). Knockback 2 cells. Grants 20% Fire property weapon buff for 10 seconds after use. Hit rate bonus: +10% per level on final hitrate.

KN_BOWLINGBASH.name: Bowling Bash
KN_BOWLINGBASH.special: AoE splash area 2. Knockback varies by level (1-5 cells). In Renewal, hits all enemies in splash. In pre-renewal, uses gutter line chain bounce system.

AC_DOUBLE.name: Double Strafe
AC_DOUBLE.special: Requires Bow + Arrow. 2 hits displayed and calculated. Note: skillratio is per-hit, so total = 2 * skillratio.

AC_SHOWER.name: Arrow Shower
AC_SHOWER.special: AoE splash. Knockback 2 cells. Requires Bow + Arrow. Removes Camouflage on cast.

SN_SHARPSHOOTING.name: Focused Arrow Strike / Sharp Shooting
SN_SHARPSHOOTING.skillratio_per_level_renewal_note: Before BaseLv scaling. Final = value * BaseLv / 100 (if BaseLv > 99)
SN_SHARPSHOOTING.special: Always crits. Hits in a piercing line AoE (splash area 2, max 14 targets). Requires Bow + Arrow. Removes Camouflage on use.

RA_ARROWSTORM.name: Arrow Storm
RA_ARROWSTORM.skillratio_note: Before BaseLv scaling. Final = value * BaseLv / 100 (if BaseLv > 99)
RA_ARROWSTORM.hit_count_note: Client shows 3 hits, server sends 1 damage packet
RA_ARROWSTORM.special: AoE splash (area 2~4 by level). Removes Camouflage. With Fear Breeze buff active, ratio increases significantly (250 per lv vs 180). Requires Bow + 5 Arrows.

RA_AIMEDBOLT.name: Aimed Bolt
RA_AIMEDBOLT.skillratio_note: Before BaseLv scaling. Final = value * BaseLv / 100 (if BaseLv > 99)
RA_AIMEDBOLT.special: 5 hits. With Fear Breeze buff, base ratio jumps from 500 to 800. Requires Bow + 3 Arrows.

RA_WUGSTRIKE.name: Warg Strike
RA_WUGSTRIKE.special: Warg-summoned attack. Ignores ATK cards, element, and DEF cards. If riding Warg, moves to target before attacking. Ignores AutoGuard and Cicada.

WM_METALICSOUND.name: Metallic Sound
WM_METALICSOUND.formula: skillratio = 120 * skill_lv + 60 * Lesson_Lv; RE_LVL_DMOD(100); if target has Sound Blend: skillratio += skillratio * 50 / 100
WM_METALICSOUND.skillratio_note: Before BaseLv scaling. Lesson_Lv = level of Lesson skill (WM_LESSON). +100 bonus if target is sleeping. +50% total if target has Sound Blend debuff.
WM_METALICSOUND.special: Magic damage type but uses weapon element. Drains SP from target. Removes Sound Blend on hit. +100 skillratio if target is Sleeping. Sound Blend bonus is multiplicative (+50% of total skillratio).

WM_REVERBERATION.name: Reverberation
WM_REVERBERATION.formula: skillratio = 700 + 300 * skill_lv; RE_LVL_DMOD(100); if target has Sound Blend: skillratio += skillratio * 50 / 100
WM_REVERBERATION.formula_comment: Comment in source: MATK [{(Skill Level x 300) + 400} x Casters Base Level / 100] %
WM_REVERBERATION.skillratio_note: Before BaseLv scaling. Sound Blend bonus is multiplicative (+50% of total).
WM_REVERBERATION.hit_count_note: Client shows 10 hits, server sends 1 damage packet
WM_REVERBERATION.special: Trap-type skill. AoE splash area 2. Sound Blend bonus adds +50% total damage. Requires 5 Arrows.

WM_SEVERE_RAINSTORM.name: Severe Rainstorm
WM_SEVERE_RAINSTORM.formula: skillratio = 100 + 100 * skill_lv + (DEX / 300 + AGI / 200); if Whip/Instrument equipped: skillratio += 20 * skill_lv; RE_LVL_DMOD(100)
WM_SEVERE_RAINSTORM.formula_note: Actual damage is via WM_SEVERE_RAINSTORM_MELEE sub-skill
WM_SEVERE_RAINSTORM.skillratio_note: Before BaseLv scaling and before DEX/AGI bonus. DEX/300 + AGI/200 is added as flat skillratio. With Instrument/Whip: +20*lv extra.
WM_SEVERE_RAINSTORM.special: Ground-targeted AoE. Places unit on ground (range 5, interval 300ms). Duration 3400ms. Cannot switch equipment during skill. Requires Bow/Musical/Whip + 10 Arrows.

RL_FIREDANCE.name: Fire Dance
RL_FIREDANCE.skillratio_note: Before BaseLv scaling. Desperado_Lv = level of GS_DESPERADO skill, adds 20 per level.
RL_FIREDANCE.special: AoE splash area 3. Requires Revolver + 3 Bullets. Desperado skill level adds +20 skillratio per level.

RL_R_TRIP.name: Round Trip
RL_R_TRIP.special: AoE splash (area 3~6 by level). Knockback 3 cells. Requires Gatling Gun + 5 Bullets. Has a secondary bonus damage component (RL_R_TRIP_PLUSATK) with formula 300 + 300*lv.

RL_FIRE_RAIN.name: Fire Rain
RL_FIRE_RAIN.special: Ground-targeted directional line attack. Fires (skill_lv + 5) waves in a line (80ms apart per wave). Each wave can hit targets in splash area 1. Requires Gatling Gun + 10 Bullets. 5s cooldown.

KO_JYUMONJIKIRI.name: Cross Slash / Juumonji Kiri
KO_JYUMONJIKIRI.formula: skillratio = 200 * skill_lv; RE_LVL_DMOD(120); if target has Jyumonji debuff: skillratio += skill_lv * BaseLv; if caster has Kagemusya: skillratio += skillratio * Kagemusya_bonus / 100
KO_JYUMONJIKIRI.skillratio_note: Before BaseLv scaling (divisor 120, not 100). Second hit on debuffed target adds skill_lv * BaseLv to ratio. Kagemusya further multiplies total.
KO_JYUMONJIKIRI.hit_count_note: Client shows 2 hits, server sends 1 damage packet
KO_JYUMONJIKIRI.special: Moves to target before attacking. Applies SC_JYUMONJIKIRI debuff. If target already has the debuff, bonus = skill_lv * BaseLv added to ratio. Kagemusya shadow clone buff multiplies total ratio. Range increases with level (4~7).

SU_PICKYPECK.name: Picky Peck
SU_PICKYPECK.formula: skillratio = 100 + 100 + 100 * skill_lv; if target HP < 50%: skillratio *= 2; if Spirit of Life learned: skillratio += skillratio * (currentHP / maxHP)
SU_PICKYPECK.skillratio_note: Doubles when target HP below 50%. Spirit of Life adds bonus proportional to caster's current HP percentage.
SU_PICKYPECK.hit_count_note: Client shows 5 hits, server sends 1 damage packet
SU_PICKYPECK.special: Damage doubles if target's current HP < 50% of max HP. If caster has learned SU_SPIRITOFLIFE, bonus = skillratio * (caster_currentHP / caster_maxHP) added.

SU_LUNATICCARROTBEAT.name: Lunatic Carrot Beat
SU_LUNATICCARROTBEAT.formula: skillratio = 100 + 100 + 100 * skill_lv; if Spirit of Life: skillratio += skillratio * (currentHP / maxHP); if BaseLv > 99: skillratio += STR; RE_LVL_DMOD(100)
SU_LUNATICCARROTBEAT.skillratio_note: Before BaseLv scaling. STR bonus only if BaseLv > 99. Spirit of Life adds HP% bonus. Has SU_LUNATICCARROTBEAT2 variant (same formula, adds Stun chance).
SU_LUNATICCARROTBEAT.hit_count_note: Client shows 3 hits, server sends 1 damage packet
SU_LUNATICCARROTBEAT.special: AoE splash (area 1~3 by level). If caster BaseLv > 99, STR is added to skillratio. Spirit of Life adds HP% bonus. Variant 2 (with item) adds 20% Stun chance.

SJ_SOLARBURST.name: Solar Burst
SJ_SOLARBURST.formula: skillratio = 100 + 900 + 220 * skill_lv; RE_LVL_DMOD(100); if Light of Sun buff: skillratio += skillratio * LightOfSun_bonus / 100
SJ_SOLARBURST.skillratio_note: Before BaseLv scaling. Light of Sun buff multiplies total skillratio by its bonus percentage.
SJ_SOLARBURST.hit_count_note: Client shows 3 hits, server sends 1 damage packet
SJ_SOLARBURST.special: AoE splash area 3. Requires Sun Stance. Light of Sun buff provides multiplicative damage bonus (skillratio * val2 / 100).

SJ_FULLMOONKICK.name: Full Moon Kick
SJ_FULLMOONKICK.formula: skillratio = 100 + 1000 + 100 * skill_lv; RE_LVL_DMOD(100); if Light of Moon buff: skillratio += skillratio * LightOfMoon_bonus / 100
SJ_FULLMOONKICK.skillratio_note: Before BaseLv scaling. Light of Moon buff multiplies total skillratio.
SJ_FULLMOONKICK.special: AoE splash area 3. Requires Moon Stance. Inflicts Blind (15 + 5*lv % chance). Light of Moon buff provides multiplicative damage bonus.

SP_SPA.name: Espa
SP_SPA.special: Against players: if allow_es_magic_pc is disabled, stuns caster and fails. Costs 1 Soul Sphere (0 at lv10). Single target magic attack.

MG_FIREBOLT.name: Fire Bolt
MG_FIREBOLT.formula: skillratio = 100 per hit (1 hit per skill level). With Flame Technic elemental: skillratio *= 5. With Spell Fist: skillratio += (bolt_lv * 100) + (spellfist_lv * 50 - 50) - 100
MG_FIREBOLT.special: Number of hits = skill level. Each hit does 100% MATK. Total damage = MATK * skill_lv. Flame Technic Option (Elemental Spirit) multiplies ratio by 5x. Spell Fist converts to melee, changes div to 1 hit.

MG_COLDBOLT.name: Cold Bolt
MG_COLDBOLT.formula: skillratio = 100 per hit (1 hit per skill level). With Cold Force elemental: skillratio *= 5. With Spell Fist: skillratio += (bolt_lv * 100) + (spellfist_lv * 50 - 50) - 100
MG_COLDBOLT.special: Number of hits = skill level. Each hit does 100% MATK. Total damage = MATK * skill_lv. Cold Force Option (Elemental Spirit) multiplies ratio by 5x. Spell Fist converts to melee.

MG_LIGHTNINGBOLT.name: Lightning Bolt
MG_LIGHTNINGBOLT.formula: skillratio = 100 per hit (1 hit per skill level). With Grace Breeze elemental: skillratio *= 5. With Spell Fist: skillratio += (bolt_lv * 100) + (spellfist_lv * 50 - 50) - 100
MG_LIGHTNINGBOLT.special: Number of hits = skill level. Each hit does 100% MATK. Total damage = MATK * skill_lv. Grace Breeze Option (Elemental Spirit) multiplies ratio by 5x. Spell Fist converts to melee.
